item.title: We're Building the Porch - House Build
item.description: A porch build in progress, showing the hands-on work and building process from start to finish. Practical construction, tools, and craftsmanship come together on the job site. What details stand out?

media:content.media:title: We're Building the Porch - House Build
media:content.media:description: A porch build in progress, showing the hands-on work and building process from start to finish. Practical construction, tools, and craftsmanship come together on the job site. What details stand out?

item.title: Honeycomb Tiles? Small Income Property Gets a Floor
item.description: A small income property gets new flooring as the build moves forward. The focus is on the tile layout, installation process, and steady progress on site. What do you think of the honeycomb tile look?

media:content.media:title: Honeycomb Tiles? Small Income Property Gets a Floor
media:content.media:description: A small income property gets new flooring as the build moves forward. The focus is on the tile layout, installation process, and steady progress on site. What do you think of the honeycomb tile look?

item.title: Framing, Sheathing and Sub-Floor: Nantahala #8
item.description: A construction update covering key stages including framing, sheathing, and sub-floor installation in a residential build. The video follows structured progress on-site. Which stage do you find most important in a build?

media:content.media:title: Framing, Sheathing and Sub-Floor: Nantahala #8
media:content.media:description: A construction update covering key stages including framing, sheathing, and sub-floor installation in a residential build. The video follows structured progress on-site. Which stage do you find most important in a build?

item.title: 3 Ways to Make Perfect Wall Partitions
item.description: A practical guide exploring different methods for constructing accurate and stable wall partitions. The video focuses on framing techniques and layout precision. Which method do you think is the most efficient?

media:content.media:title: 3 Ways to Make Perfect Wall Partitions
media:content.media:description: A practical guide exploring different methods for constructing accurate and stable wall partitions. The video focuses on framing techniques and layout precision. Which method do you think is the most efficient?

item.title: Building a Dream Home
item.description: A look at the building process behind a dream home, from site work to craftsmanship and project progress. What part of the build stands out most?

media:content.media:title: Building a Dream Home
media:content.media:description: A look at the building process behind a dream home, from site work to craftsmanship and project progress. What part of the build stands out most?

item.title: How Your Roof Stays Up
item.description: A clear breakdown of roof framing and structure, explaining how loads are distributed and supported in residential construction. The video explores key building principles that keep roofs stable and secure. What part of house construction do you find most surprising?

media:content.media:title: How Your Roof Stays Up
media:content.media:description: A clear breakdown of roof framing and structure, explaining how loads are distributed and supported in residential construction. The video explores key building principles that keep roofs stable and secure. What part of house construction do you find most surprising?

item.title: Installing Waterproofing
item.description: A step-by-step look at applying waterproofing during a farmhouse construction project. The video highlights protection methods and building durability. Why is waterproofing so critical in home construction?

media:content.media:title: Installing Waterproofing
media:content.media:description: A step-by-step look at applying waterproofing during a farmhouse construction project. The video highlights protection methods and building durability. Why is waterproofing so critical in home construction?

item.title: Master the rafters
item.description: A look at rafter installation and alignment during a residential construction project. The video focuses on technique, structure, and roof framing fundamentals. What part of roof framing looks the most complex?

media:content.media:title: Master the rafters
media:content.media:description: A look at rafter installation and alignment during a residential construction project. The video focuses on technique, structure, and roof framing fundamentals. What part of roof framing looks the most complex?

item.title: Precision Blocking for Wall Plate Stability
item.description: A construction-focused video showing how precision blocking improves wall plate stability in a residential build. The process highlights framing accuracy and structural reinforcement. What detail do you think matters most in strong wall framing?

media:content.media:title: Precision Blocking for Wall Plate Stability
media:content.media:description: A construction-focused video showing how precision blocking improves wall plate stability in a residential build. The process highlights framing accuracy and structural reinforcement. What detail do you think matters most in strong wall framing?

item.title: The Tools We Use on Every Build
item.description: A practical look at the tools used on every build, with a focus on job site work, building process, and the equipment that helps keep projects moving. What tools do you rely on most?

media:content.media:title: The Tools We Use on Every Build
media:content.media:description: A practical look at the tools used on every build, with a focus on job site work, building process, and the equipment that helps keep projects moving. What tools do you rely on most?

item.title: Building a Block Foundation
item.description: A detailed look at constructing a block foundation as part of a house build. The video highlights masonry work and structural preparation. What makes foundation work so critical in construction?

media:content.media:title: Building a Block Foundation
media:content.media:description: A detailed look at constructing a block foundation as part of a house build. The video highlights masonry work and structural preparation. What makes foundation work so critical in construction?
